gateVerdict: NOT MET, w1 row STAYS OPEN. (1) The real MLX featurizer WORKS: it lifts held-out agreement from the degenerate transparent baseline (0.41 math / 0.50 physics) to within-domain 0.727 (math) / 0.896 (physics) mean over 3 seeds -- physics clears 0.80 within-domain. (2) But HELD-OUT-DOMAIN (train math -> test physics) agreement is 0.50 = chance: the process-reward direction learned on math does NOT transfer across domains -- the coverage trap the tool warned of, now empirically confirmed with real features. The gate requires >=0.80 HELD-OUT-DOMAIN. (3) The entire PRM-as-dense-RLVR-reward half (tools/run_rlvr.py) with a symbolic reward-hack audit is UNRUN (needs a GPU RL stack; not local).
